metaData.Key Information:
ARCOS range of kitchen gadgets are professional tools designed for a specific purpose and function in the kitchen. They are practical and innovative, and are a great addition to any professional or domestic kitchen. Flexible and easy to use, suitable for spreading butter, egg or marinates. Made of heat resistant silicone and suitable for temperatures up to 240 degrees Celsius. Product is NSF certified.

The 200 mm pastry brush will allow you to decorate your pastries with cleanliness and perfection. Grease your moulds or cover the surfaces of your desserts so that the lines don't show. It is made of polypropylene, which makes it long-lasting and keeps the brush clean and free from bacterial growth.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place .
